title: Atlas Opens the Way Forward
description: On pages 17–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #16, Unknown person #17, Luffy, Atlas, Vegapunk as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Hold on tight! We're going down!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, you mean to make a grand sacrifice of yourself?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: 25 years ago, the pirate, gold. Roger...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: ...achieved the unprecedented by circumnavigating the globe!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It only worked 'cause of 'You, right, atlas?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have no doubt they heard the whole thing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have all come to the same conclusion at this point,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have let you say far too much, Vegapunk!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Oh my... I have really rusted away...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: This is "The Time" you spoke of...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They must've heard the voices of the past from the purest source possible...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I anticipate that is what will ultimately determine how things transpire in the future!!!

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 30 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
